props.animation: Enables smooth transitions when values change. When `true`, uses default duration (300ms) and easing (`ease`). Can be an object with `duration` (ms) and `easing` (CSS easing) properties.
props.autoDraw: Trace the length of the line when first rendered. Since 4.1.0 it accepts `'once'`, to make the animation play only on mount and make the subsequent value changes interpolate smoothly.
props.autoDrawDuration: Amount of time (in ms) to run the trace animation.
props.autoDrawEasing: The easing function to use for the trace animation.
props.autoLineWidth: Automatically expand bars to use space efficiently.
props.fill: Using the **fill** property allows you to better customize the look and feel of your sparkline.
props.gradient: An array of colors to use as a linear-gradient.
props.gradientDirection: The direction the gradient should run.
props.inset: Extends the line beyond the chart boundary so it runs edge-to-edge.
props.interactive: Enables hover tracking, keyboard navigation (arrow keys), and focus support. Required for **tooltip** to work.
props.labels: An array of string labels that correspond to the same index as its data counterpart.
props.lineWidth: The thickness of the line, in px.
props.markerSize: The diameter of marker circles, in px.
props.markerStroke: The stroke (border) color applied to marker circles.
props.max: The maximum value of the sparkline.
props.min: The minimum value of the sparkline.
props.padding: Low `smooth` or high `line-width` values may result in cropping, increase padding to compensate.
props.showLabels: Show labels below each data point.
props.showMarkers: Show circle markers at each data point.
props.smooth: Controls the curve tension. `true` defaults to 8, `false` or `0` gives straight lines. Higher values produce smoother curves.
props.smoothMode: The interpolation algorithm to use. `default` uses corner-rounding which can cause the line to appear away from actual values. `monotone` makes the line stick to exact data points. In `monotone` mode, **smooth** is limited to 8.
props.tooltip: Displays a tooltip on the active data point. Requires **interactive**. Can be `true` or an object with `titleFormat`, `offset`, and `showCrosshair` options.
props.type: Choose between a trendline or bars.

events.update:currentIndex: Emitted when the active data point changes via mouse hover, keyboard navigation, or focus. The payload is the point index, or `null` when no point is active.

slots.label: Custom content for data point labels. Receives `{ index: number, value: string }`.
slots.tooltip: Custom content for the tooltip. Receives `{ index: number, value: number }`.
